key_facts: The 119th Congress (2025-2027) is in session with a Republican Senate majority.
The Senate floor schedule is controlled by the Majority Leader and changes frequently, often daily.
Typical June Senate business includes appropriations bills, NDAA debate, judicial/executive nominations, and potentially reconciliation legislation.
The official Senate floor schedule is published at senate.gov/legislative/schedule.htm.
All web search and web fetch tools were unavailable during this research session, preventing access to real-time schedule data.
No specific votes, bills, or nominations scheduled for June 2026 could be confirmed due to tool unavailability.
